description_long: This object is a classic cylindrical trash bin with a faceted exterior, reminiscent of galvanized steel bins commonly found in urban environments. The bin features a removable flat lid with a small handle on top, and the lid can be seen both on and off in the images. The interior of the bin is hollow and contains several irregular, dark geometric shapes representing trash or debris. The bin's body is vertically ribbed, providing structural strength and a utilitarian appearance. There are no visible wheels or external attachments, and the handles are simple, small, and top-mounted on the lid. The surface is a uniform gray, with no visible signage, labels, or recycling symbols.
description: A cylindrical, faceted gray trash bin with a removable flat lid and top-mounted handle, containing dark debris inside. The bin has a utilitarian, ribbed exterior and no visible signage or wheels.
description_view_0: Three trash bins are visible, one with a closed lid, one open showing dark debris, and one in the background; the flat lid and top handle are clearly seen.
description_view_1: The bins are shown from the side, with one bin lying on its side and debris spilling out, highlighting the flat lid and the absence of wheels.
description_view_2: A front-facing view with one bin tipped over, its lid removed and debris spilling out, emphasizing the open interior and the faceted exterior.
description_view_3: A rear and side view showing the bins from behind, with the lid and debris on the ground, and the ribbed structure of the bin body visible.
